---
title: "CleanSlideKit RevealJS"
subtitle: "Example deck"
author: "rkskmt"
format: cleanslidekit-revealjs
---

## Headings & text

A normal paragraph. Inline highlight via `hl.lua`, full-width colon alignment
via `fw-colon.lua`, and the `.en` typography for English co-notation:

過学習（[overfitting]{.en}）と DNN（[**Deep Neural Network**]{.en}）。

## Math

Inline $e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0$ and display:

$$\int_0^1 x^2 \, dx = \frac{1}{3}$$

## Diagram (mermaid)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[Data] --> B[Model] --> C[Slides]
```

## Plotly embed

Export a Plotly figure to HTML, then embed it sized:

::: {.plotly-iframe src="my-figure.html" width="900" height="520"}
:::

## Compact tabset

Quarto's native `.panel-tabset`, restyled as a small segmented control —
handy for splitting an index page by term:

:::: {.panel-tabset}

### 前期

::: {.lectures}

### Getting started {.sec .cat1}

::: {.grid .cat1}
- [Lecture one](example.qmd)
- [Lecture two](example.qmd)
:::

:::

### 後期

::: {.lectures}

### Going deeper {.sec .cat4}

::: {.grid .cat4}
- [Lecture three](example.qmd)
:::

:::

::::

## UI kit

This deck ships `peek-ui.js` (overview), `search-ui.js` (in-deck search), and
`slide-ui.js` (layout helpers) automatically — no wiring needed.
